src/test/java/org/acme/quickstart/Native.general_idea: Replace deprecated SubstrateTest annotation with NativeImageTest to align with Quarkus naming conventions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 11 to enable compilation for the new JDK.
Explicitly add the maven-compiler-plugin with a specific version to ensure consistent compilation behavior.
Enable parameter name retention in compiled class files, often required by frameworks like Quarkus.
Switch from quarkus-bom to quarkus-universe-bom and update version to 1.5.2.Final to align with newer Quarkus ecosystem standards.
Update the Quarkus Maven plugin version to match the new platform version.
Bump the Maven Surefire plugin version from 2.22.0 to 2.22.1 for minor bug fixes and compatibility.
Replace deprecated systemProperties configuration with systemPropertyVariables in Surefire and Failsafe plugins.
Remove redundant native-image goal configuration from the native profile in favor of Quarkus property-based configuration.
